cashflowExplainer.header: Where does your money actually go?
cashflowExplainer.subheader: Traditional banks lend your deposits and keep the profit. Here, your money works for you.

saveIt.title: Park it safely
saveIt.body: Your balance sits in your non-custodial wallet. It earns 100% CDI daily, automatically. No lock-ups, no minimum holding period.

growIt.title: Move it freely
growIt.body: Send to any country with transparent fees. Receive in real-time. No hidden charges, no waiting days for international transfers to clear.

cashflowExplainer.microExample: Example: Send $1,000 internationally. Traditional bank: $35 fee + 3 days. diBoaS: $4.80 fee + instant.
cashflowExplainer.limitation: International transfers depend on receiving bank processing times. Fees shown are for standard transfers.
cashflowExplainer.brandPromise: Your money should move as fast as you do.
cashflowExplainer.microDisclosure: CDI rates are variable and based on central bank policy. Past performance does not indicate future results.
cashflowExplainer.ariaLabel: How your money flows at diBoaS
